The changes needed:
1. Change SPRINT_NUMBER to 10
2. Update SPRINT_START to 2026-04-20
3. Update SPRINT_END to 2026-04-24
4. Add SPRINT_UPDATED_AT field with current timestamp

I also need to follow the P4 rule (create .bak before modifying) and P5 (append done.log entry).
